prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华南师范大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2950名→2239名→2981名→4256名→4681名。2021至2022年位次前移（竞争加剧），2023年起连续三年后移，近3年累计后移约2442名，呈明显下行趋势；2025年基准位次约4681名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年29人、2022年33人、2023年33人、2024年37人、2025年37人；2026年计划增至38人（较2025年扩招1人，增幅约2.7%），小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第79名，近年稳定在75–80区间，属于全国百强师范类院校，办学层次稳固；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，仅1个中性事件（涉及学校管理回应），无正面或负面舆情冲击；抖音学校热度总排名第70位，评价为一般，综合热度43.8万，未出现爆火或负面舆情集中现象，报考心理预期平稳；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评A+（全国顶尖），马克思主义理论获评A，体育学、教育学获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科。心理学（师范）为该校王牌专业，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业2026年热度指数55.84，评估为分化观望，较2025年基本稳定；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约7.8万人，较2025年6.74万人增长约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，与海南省同属华南地区，地理距离较近，气候与文化相近，对海南考生有一定地域偏好优势；该校在海南招生计划相对稳定，2026年38人属中等规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年考生总数大幅增长（+15.7%）带来的竞争加剧、招生计划仅小幅扩招（+2.7%）的有限缓解作用，以及学校声誉平稳、王牌学科吸引力等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年4681名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约4817名，区间4317–5317名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4817名，区间4317–5317名。位次在区间下限（4317名）以内可重点冲刺一档专业（汉语言文学师范、思政师范、历史学师范）；位次在预测值附近（约4800名）建议以二档为主（心理学师范、法学、应用心理学），兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在区间上限（5317名）附近建议以三档保底（计算机师范、光电信息），同时关注生物科学等相对低分专业。心理学（A+）为该校王牌，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for South China Normal University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2950 → 2239 → 2981 → 4256 → 4681. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2022 (increased competition), then moved backward for three consecutive years starting in 2023, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2442 positions over the past three years, showing a clear downward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4681. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province: 29 students in 2021, 33 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 38 students (an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, a growth of about 2.7%), a slight expansion that somewhat eases competitive pressure, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, and has been stable in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the top 100 normal universities nationwide with a solid academic level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with only one neutral event (involving school management response) and no positive or negative public opinion shocks; the university's Douyin popularity total ranking is 70th, rated as average, with a comprehensive popularity of 438,000, showing no explosive popularity or concentrated negative public opinion, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, psychology was rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist theory was rated A, physical education and education were rated A-, totaling four disciplines rated A- or above. Psychology (teacher training) is the university's flagship major, which has a strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity index for teacher training/education majors in 2026 is 55.84, assessed as differentiated and wait-and-see, basically stable compared to 2025; the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Hainan Province in 2026 is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,400 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, which is in the same South China region as Hainan, with relatively close geographical distance, similar climate and culture, giving it a certain regional preference advantage for Hainan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan is relatively stable, with 38 students in 2026 being a medium scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in the total number of candidates in 2026 (+15.7%), the limited mitigating effect of a small enrollment expansion (+2.7%), as well as the stable school reputation and the appeal of flagship disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move backward from the 2025 ranking of 4681. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4817, with a range of 4317–5317.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 4817, with a range of 4317–5317. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (4317) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature Teacher Training, Ideological and Political Education Teacher Training, History Teacher Training); candidates with rankings near the predicted value (about 4800) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Psychology Teacher Training, Law, Applied Psychology), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (5317) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Computer Science Teacher Training, Optoelectronic Information), while also paying attention to relatively low-score majors such as Biological Science. Psychology (A+) is the university's flagship major and deserves special attention.
